docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY VARELAS, JOSHUA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA VARELAS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BRIAN CUNNINGHAM IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2024 - JUDGMENT.
